name: lpwmg-calc
description: Low-frequency / long-period PWM frequency, duty-cycle, and shared upper-bound register search tool. emb-agent core keeps only the abstract spec and does not include any chip-level LPWMG implementation.
outputs: candidate prescaler and shared upper-bound combinations
notes: This tool is intended for LPWMG / long-period PWM blocks independent of ordinary TMx PWM.
emb core defines only the protocol; shared period registers, half-step duty, channel-output muxing, and macro hints should come from external adapters.
Vendor/device bindings must not enter emb-agent core.
